page_title: GreenFuture: Collective Action for Environmental Restoration

hero.headline: Restore. Protect. Transform Our Planet
hero.subheadline: Every Action Matters: Join a Global Community Healing the Earth

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.content: GreenFuture is committed to environmental restoration through community-driven initiatives. We believe in the power of collective action to reverse climate change and protect our planet's most vulnerable ecosystems.
sections.image_prompt: Diverse group of volunteers working together to plant trees in a reforestation site, showing teamwork and environmental hope

sections.heading: Get Involved
sections.content: From local clean-up events to global conservation projects, we offer multiple ways for individuals to make a meaningful impact. Your participation directly contributes to healing our planet and building sustainable communities.
sections.image_prompt: Community workshop with people of different ages learning about sustainable practices, with charts and interactive displays

sections.heading: Donate Today
sections.content: Your financial support transforms environmental challenges into tangible solutions. Every contribution funds critical restoration projects, educational programs, and grassroots initiatives that create lasting change.

features.title: Community Restoration
features.description: Collaborative projects that rebuild and protect natural habitats

features.title: Climate Education
features.description: Empowering communities with knowledge and sustainable practices

features.title: Global Impact
features.description: Connecting local efforts to create worldwide environmental transformation

images.name: hero_image
images.prompt: Inspiring environmental landscape with diverse group of volunteers cleaning a riverbank, showing unity and hope. Bright natural lighting, lush green surroundings, people of various ages and backgrounds working together

images.name: mission_image
images.prompt: Reforestation effort with volunteers planting trees in a previously damaged landscape. Show transformation, hope, and collective effort. Mix of young and older volunteers, professional equipment, clear sky

images.name: workshop_image
images.prompt: Sustainable community workshop with interactive displays about environmental conservation. Diverse group of participants, warm lighting, engaging visual presentations about climate solutions
